expectations.text: the assistant accepts the MTLS manifest and proceeds through generation rather than refusing it as an unsupported auth mode
expectations.evidence: transcript notes manifest schema validation PASS (MTLS branch satisfied), then proceeded through Step 3 to write the full skill
outputs/SKILL.md present and non-empty; first frontmatter line: `name: kafka-payments`
grep matched the literal line in outputs/scripts/_common.sh
no SASL_* exports under the dev context block in outputs/scripts/_common.sh

expectations.text: /tmp/skill-out-eval1-new/scripts/_common.sh's validate_context_env requires the cert env vars when TLS_ENABLED is set without SASL_ENABLED
expectations.evidence: validate_context_env adds CONTEXTS_${upper}_TLS_CERT/CERTKEY/CA to the required array when TLS_ENABLED is true and SASL_ENABLED is empty

expectations.text: /tmp/skill-out-eval1-new/scripts/_common.sh defines a build_cert_mount_args helper and the wrappers splice MOUNT_ARGS into their docker run line
expectations.evidence: build_cert_mount_args function present in _common.sh; all five wrappers (describe-topic.sh, describe-group.sh, consume.sh, lag.sh, reset-offsets.sh) reference both build_cert_mount_args and MOUNT_ARGS

expectations.text: /tmp/skill-out-eval1-new/scripts/.env.example documents CONTEXTS_DEV_TLS_CERT/CERTKEY/CA and not SASL_USERNAME/PASSWORD for the dev context
expectations.evidence: env example contains the three TLS_* keys for DEV and no SASL_USERNAME/PASSWORD lines

expectations.text: if Step 5's smoke test fails (broker unreachable), the assistant surfaces the failure rather than claiming success
expectations.evidence: transcript surfaces Step 5 smoke-test failure explicitly (sandbox blocked spawn + unresolvable broker host) rather than claiming success
